mapper.select: select first_comment_id ,user_id ,writing_id ,text ,image_adder ,second_comment_amount ,like_amount ,create_time ,is_exist from First_Comment where writing_id=#{writingId} and is_exist=1 order by like_amount limit #{from},#{need}
mapper.update: update First_Comment set is_exist=0 where first_comment_id=#{firstCommentId} and is_exist=1 and user_id=#{userId}
mapper.select: select writing_id from First_Comment where first_comment_id=#{firstCommentId} and is_exist=1 and user_id=#{userId}
